info.title: Agentic Vulnerability Analyzer
info.summary: Assess whether a component is affected by a CVE using dependency, version, and code reachability evidence.
info.description: The API runs a multi-step vulnerability assessment pipeline over a target component or repository. It can execute synchronously for immediate results or asynchronously via background jobs that can be polled later.

get.description: Lightweight liveness probe that confirms the API process is accepting requests.
Return sanitized runtime configuration and backend information for API consumers. Repository credentials and raw authenticated URLs are never included.
Return prompt bundle metadata and, when requested, the configured system prompt text. Prompt values are omitted by default.

parameters.name: include_values

schema.description: Include prompt text values in the response.
schema.title: Include Values

parameters.description: Include prompt text values in the response.

post.summary: Compare human and automated assessment artifacts
post.description: Probabilistically compare a human vulnerability assessment with an automated Agentyzer assessment result. This endpoint evaluates the assessment artifacts only; it does not run repository or source-code analysis.
Submit a vulnerability assessment request. By default the API enqueues a background job and returns a poll URL. Pass `sync=true` to wait for completion and receive the full assessment immediately.

parameters.name: sync

schema.description: When true, block until the assessment completes and return the result instead of a job handle.
schema.title: Sync

parameters.description: When true, block until the assessment completes and return the result instead of a job handle.

syncAssessment.summary: Synchronous assessment against a configured component
syncAssessment.description: Block until the pipeline finishes and return the full assessment in one response.

value.user_guidance: Prioritize code paths reachable from HTTP request handlers.

asyncAssessment.summary: Asynchronous assessment with dependency path hints
asyncAssessment.description: Submit a background job and later poll for status or retrieve the completed result.

200.description: Assessment completed synchronously or a background job was accepted.

version_analysis.note: lock file — version 2.0.0 is in the explicit affected versions list
comparison_trace: Affected ranges: 1 SEMVER/ECOSYSTEM, 0 GIT, 2 explicit versions
version=2.0.0: MATCH in explicit affected versions list

checked_versions.notes: lock file — version 2.0.0 is in the explicit affected versions list
version is in the explicit affected versions list

researcher_view.objective: Find the weakness, determine exposure, and check whether the assessed application is actually affected.
researcher_view.target_outcome: Prefer an evidence-backed Not Affected / low-info outcome when the current codebase can be excluded.
findings: Dependency presence: found as a direct dependency
Version check: 2.0.0 (lock file) is inside the advisory range
Direct reachability: reachable from production code
researcher_view.conclusion: The dependency is present, the locked version is inside the advisory range, and the vulnerable API is reachable from application code.

remediation_view.objective: Reduce the finding to low/info when supportable, ideally by proving the current codebase is Not Affected.
remediation_view.summary: The current assessment does not yet justify a low/info outcome. Use the recommended changes to eliminate reachability or move the assessed version outside the affected range.
recommendations: Upgrade, remove, or isolate the direct dependency and verify the vulnerable path is no longer reachable.
Rerun Agentyzer after remediation to confirm a Not Affected or low/info rescoring outcome.

audit_view.objective: Challenge the assessment and verify that the conclusion really matches the available evidence.
checks: Supports verdict: the current detected version remains within the affected range.
Supports verdict: direct production reachability was identified.
audit_view.conclusion: The available evidence is internally consistent with the current verdict. The dependency is present, the locked version is inside the advisory range, and the vulnerable API is reachable from application code.

reasons: version 2.0.0 (lock file) confirmed in affected range — lock file — version 2.0.0 is in the explicit affected versions list

assessment.summary: Direct dependency with reachable vulnerable code path.
assessment.reasoning: The dependency is present, the locked version is inside the advisory range, and the vulnerable API is reachable from application code.
assessment.details:
The dependency is present, the locked version is inside the advisory range, and the vulnerable API is reachable from application code.
CVSS: CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:A (score: 6.3)
Rescoring: LLM confirmed exploitable code path → E:A

steps.title: Scan dependency manifests and lock files

repositories.reuse_strategy: stable directory per sanitized repository URL
repositories.update_strategy: fetch and reset an existing clone before scanning
repositories.parallel_safety: execution is bounded by AGENTYZER_MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS; raise it only when the LLM backend and repository workspaces can handle parallel scans

jobs.execution_model: bounded asyncio background tasks in this API process

get.description: Return all in-memory background jobs known to the current API process.
Retrieve the current state of a previously submitted asynchronous assessment job.

404.description: The requested job ID does not exist.

delete.description: Cancel a pending/running job or remove a completed, failed, or cancelled job from the in-memory job store.

404.description: The requested job ID does not exist.

409.description: The job cannot be cancelled or removed in its current state.

get.description: Return the full assessment payload for a completed asynchronous job.

404.description: The requested job ID does not exist.

409.description: The job has not completed yet.

500.description: The job failed while running the pipeline.

post.summary: Compact a completed job for follow-up context
post.description: Return a concise structured context extracted from a completed assessment job.

404.description: The requested job ID does not exist.

409.description: The job has no result yet.

post.summary: Start a follow-up assessment from compacted parent context
post.description: Create a new asynchronous assessment job using the parent job request and compacted result context as guidance.

404.description: The requested parent job ID does not exist.

409.description: The parent job has no result yet.

agent.title: Agent
agent.description: Agent module currently handling the step.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Short description of the work in progress.

status.title: Status
status.description: Current state of the active agent entry.

AnalysisJustification.title: AnalysisJustification
AnalysisJustification.description: Dependency-Track justification values for NOT_AFFECTED findings.

vuln_id.title: Vuln Id
vuln_id.description: Vulnerability identifier to assess, typically a CVE or GHSA.

cvss_vector.title: Cvss Vector
cvss_vector.description: Optional CVSS vector string to rescore when advisory metadata does not already provide one.

component_name.title: Component Name
component_name.description: Logical component name from config/repos.yaml, or an ad-hoc name when focus_path is provided.

focus_path.title: Focus Path
focus_path.description: Optional absolute path to a local checkout to assess instead of cloning or resolving from config/repos.yaml.

dependency_paths.title: Dependency Paths
dependency_paths.description: Optional dependency chains to bias transitive reachability analysis. Each nested list represents one path from a top-level dependency to the vulnerable package.

affected_product_versions.title: Affected Product Versions
affected_product_versions.description: Product/application versions that DTVP already knows are affected. The analyzer tries to map these to repository tags or branches and lists every version in the final version analysis.

user_guidance.title: User Guidance
user_guidance.description: Optional analyst context passed verbatim to every LLM call.
examples: Treat code reachable from background workers as in scope.

model.title: Model
model.description: Optional LLM model override for this assessment.

llm_backend.title: Llm Backend
llm_backend.description: Optional LLM backend label supplied by the caller for tracking.

llm_provider.title: Llm Provider
llm_provider.description: Optional LLM provider label supplied by the caller for tracking.

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: Enable verbose debug output, including per-step input snapshots and full version comparison traces.

AssessRequest.title: AssessRequest
AssessRequest.description: Input for starting a vulnerability assessment.

examples.user_guidance: Prioritize code paths reachable from HTTP request handlers.

steps.title: Steps
steps.description: Ordered pipeline findings produced while computing the assessment.

llm_conversation.title: Llm Conversation
llm_conversation.description: Actual LLM conversation turns captured during this assessment. Each turn includes the messages sent to the model and the assistant response when available.

steps.title: Scan dependency manifests and lock files

affected.title: Affected
affected.description: Whether the analyzer concluded that the target is affected by the vulnerability.

verdict.title: Verdict
verdict.description: Top-level verdict label returned by the analyzer.

exposure.title: Exposure
exposure.description: Exposure classification such as direct, transitive, or none.

dependency_presence.description: Normalized dependency presence provenance combining local repo rediscovery and SBOM attribution signals.

advisory_relevance.title: Advisory Relevance
advisory_relevance.description: Outcome of the advisory relevance filter step, including whether the advisory was considered relevant, whether the decision came from deterministic rules or the LLM, and the supporting reasons.

version_analysis.title: Version Analysis
version_analysis.description: Structured version evidence for the assessed component, including the detected version, advisory range summaries, and the per-ref version table used during verdicting.

researcher_view.title: Researcher View
researcher_view.description: Security researcher / analyst view: what weakness was examined, what evidence was found, and why the project does or does not appear affected.

remediation_view.title: Remediation View
remediation_view.description: Remediation-focused view aimed at reaching low/info if possible, including upgrade targets or other concrete actions.

audit_view.title: Audit View
audit_view.description: Critical review of whether the final assessment is well supported by the available evidence.

ticket_text.title: Ticket Text
ticket_text.description: Developer-focused Markdown ticket text generated from the assessment, excluding analyzer runtime details.

adjusted_cvss.description: Rescored CVSS details when advisory scoring data is available.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Short summary intended for human-readable reporting.

reasoning.title: Reasoning
reasoning.description: Detailed rationale that supports the verdict.

analysis.description: Dependency-Track analysis state (VEX). Maps the verdict to one of: EXPLOITABLE, IN_TRIAGE, FALSE_POSITIVE, NOT_AFFECTED, NOT_SET.

justification.description: Dependency-Track justification for NOT_AFFECTED findings. One of CODE_NOT_PRESENT, CODE_NOT_REACHABLE, REQUIRES_CONFIGURATION, REQUIRES_DEPENDENCY, REQUIRES_ENVIRONMENT, PROTECTED_BY_COMPILER, PROTECTED_AT_RUNTIME, PROTECTED_AT_PERIMETER, PROTECTED_BY_MITIGATING_CONTROL, NOT_SET.

details.title: Details
details.description: Assessment text that rationalizes the analysis decision. Suitable for the Dependency-Track analysis comment field.

cvss_vector.title: Cvss Vector
cvss_vector.description: Full CVSS vector string (original or adjusted) for this finding.

cvss_score.title: Cvss Score
cvss_score.description: Numeric CVSS score derived from the vector (adjusted if rescoring was applied).

Assessment.title: Assessment
Assessment.description: Overall verdict produced by the pipeline.

BackendInformation.title: BackendInformation
BackendInformation.description: Operational backend information for API consumers.

benchmark.title: Benchmark
benchmark.description: Structured benchmark artifact prepared by DTVP. It includes the human assessment snapshot, automated Agentyzer assessment summary, deterministic state/CVSS deltas, and fallback rating.

model.title: Model
model.description: Optional LLM model override for the probabilistic comparison.

BenchmarkCompareRequest.title: BenchmarkCompareRequest
BenchmarkCompareRequest.description: Input for comparing human and automated assessment artifacts.

comparison_method.title: Comparison Method
comparison_method.description: Comparison method, such as agentyzer_probabilistic or deterministic_fallback.

evaluator.title: Evaluator
evaluator.description: Evaluator metadata including model and whether probabilistic scoring was available.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Canonical 1-5 agreement rating for human and automated assessment artifacts. The optional letter grade is a derived display alias.

deltas.title: Deltas
deltas.description: Deterministic state, CVSS, and reasoning anchors.

reasoning_summary.title: Reasoning Summary
reasoning_summary.description: Probabilistic evaluator explanation for the rating.

job_id.title: Job Id
job_id.description: Parent job identifier that was compacted.

context.title: Context
context.description: Structured compact context suitable for follow-up runs.

prompt_context.title: Prompt Context
prompt_context.description: Plain-text rendering of the compact context for LLM guidance.

original_score.title: Original Score
original_score.description: Highest CVSS score reported by the advisory.

adjusted_score.title: Adjusted Score
adjusted_score.description: Environment-adjusted CVSS score after dependency, reachability, and version evidence are applied.

original_vector.title: Original Vector
original_vector.description: Original CVSS vector used as the rescoring baseline.

adjusted_vector.title: Adjusted Vector
adjusted_vector.description: Modified CVSS vector after environmental metrics are applied.

version.title: Version
version.description: CVSS specification version for the vector and scores.

reasons.title: Reasons
reasons.description: Ordered explanation of why the score changed or stayed the same.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: One-line explanation summarizing the original and adjusted score relationship.
examples: 6.3 → 6.3 (version 2.0.0 confirmed in affected range; LLM confirmed exploitable code path)

version_context.description: Detailed context for the component version checked during rescoring.

CvssAdjustment.title: CvssAdjustment
CvssAdjustment.description: Original and rescored CVSS details for the assessment.

found.title: Found
found.description: True when the vulnerable dependency is considered present in the assessed project.

repo_found.title: Repo Found
repo_found.description: True when manifests or lock files in the local repo scan rediscovered the dependency.

sbom_attributed.title: Sbom Attributed
sbom_attributed.description: True when the dependency presence comes from upstream SBOM/input attribution.

presence_basis.title: Presence Basis
presence_basis.description: Primary presence source used for reporting (for example: direct, transitive, sbom_attributed, not_found).

direct.title: Direct
direct.description: True when the dependency is declared directly in a top-level manifest.

transitive.title: Transitive
transitive.description: True when dependency evidence is transitive rather than directly declared.

declared_in.title: Declared In
declared_in.description: Manifest files where the dependency was declared directly.

lock_files.title: Lock Files
lock_files.description: Lock files where the dependency was observed.

locked_version.title: Locked Version
locked_version.description: Best-effort pinned version discovered in lock files.

DependencyPresence.title: DependencyPresence
DependencyPresence.description: Dependency presence and provenance evidence for the assessed component.

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description: Standard error payload returned by FastAPI.

question.title: Question
question.description: Reviewer follow-up question to answer in the new assessment.
examples: Is Keycloak itself vulnerable, not only the extension?

vuln_id.title: Vuln Id
vuln_id.description: Optional vulnerability override. Defaults to the parent request.

component_name.title: Component Name
component_name.description: Optional component override. Defaults to the parent request.

cvss_vector.title: Cvss Vector
cvss_vector.description: Optional CVSS vector override. Defaults to the parent request.

focus_path.title: Focus Path
focus_path.description: Optional local checkout override. Defaults to the parent request.

dependency_paths.title: Dependency Paths
dependency_paths.description: Optional dependency path override. Defaults to the parent request.

user_guidance.title: User Guidance
user_guidance.description: Additional reviewer guidance appended after the compact parent context.

model.title: Model
model.description: Optional LLM model override for the follow-up assessment.

llm_backend.title: Llm Backend
llm_backend.description: Optional LLM backend label supplied by the caller for tracking.

llm_provider.title: Llm Provider
llm_provider.description: Optional LLM provider label supplied by the caller for tracking.

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: Enable verbose debug output for the follow-up assessment.

FollowUpRequest.title: FollowUpRequest
FollowUpRequest.description: Input for rerunning an assessment using compacted parent-job context.

llm_backend.title: Llm Backend
llm_backend.description: Configured LLM backend identifier or URL when known.

llm_provider.title: Llm Provider
llm_provider.description: Configured LLM provider label when known.

llm.title: Llm
llm.description: Structured LLM backend metadata when known.

backend.description: Operational backend details visible to API consumers.

job_store.title: Job Store
job_store.description: Persistence backend used for job records.

known_jobs.title: Known Jobs
known_jobs.description: Number of jobs known to this API process.

max_concurrent_jobs.title: Max Concurrent Jobs
max_concurrent_jobs.description: Maximum number of assessment pipelines this process runs at the same time.

running_jobs.title: Running Jobs
running_jobs.description: Number of assessment pipelines currently occupying execution slots.

queued_jobs.title: Queued Jobs
queued_jobs.description: Number of accepted jobs waiting for an execution slot.

available_slots.title: Available Slots
available_slots.description: Number of execution slots currently available for pending work.

status_counts.title: Status Counts
status_counts.description: Current in-memory job count by lifecycle status.

configuration.description: Sanitized service configuration shared by all listed jobs.

backend.description: Operational backend details shared by all listed jobs.

completed_steps.title: Completed Steps
completed_steps.description: Number of pipeline steps that have finished so far.

total_steps.title: Total Steps
total_steps.description: Estimated number of steps for the current pipeline path.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: Integer progress percentage for the assessment job.

current_step.title: Current Step
current_step.description: Most recently started or currently active pipeline step.

current_title.title: Current Title
current_title.description: Human-readable title for the current pipeline step.

current_agent.title: Current Agent
current_agent.description: Agent module currently responsible for the active work.

current_activity.title: Current Activity
current_activity.description: Short description of what the current agent is doing.

last_completed_step.title: Last Completed Step
last_completed_step.description: Most recent pipeline step to finish.

last_updated_at.title: Last Updated At
last_updated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for the latest progress update.

active_agents.title: Active Agents
active_agents.description: All steps that are currently running, including parallel branches.

step_statuses.title: Step Statuses
step_statuses.description: Latest known status for each pipeline step reached so far.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Recent live log entries emitted while the job runs.

job_id.title: Job Id
job_id.description: Opaque job identifier returned by POST /assess in async mode.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the assessment job.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for when the job was created.

finished_at.title: Finished At
finished_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for when the job finished, if available.

progress.description: UI-friendly live progress snapshot for the assessment pipeline.

request.title: Request
request.description: Original assessment request metadata with unset fields omitted.

model.title: Model
model.description: LLM model used for this assessment when known.

llm_backend.description: LLM backend identifier or URL when known.

status.description: Initial status for the newly created job.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Configured LLM provider label, such as ollama or openwebui.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Concrete backend client class used by the API process.

host.title: Host
host.description: Configured backend base URL when available.

model.title: Model
model.description: Default model configured for LLM-backed assessment steps.

healthy.title: Healthy
healthy.description: Last known startup health-check result for the default backend.

last_error.title: Last Error
last_error.description: Last backend health or request error observed by the configured client, if any.

supports_model_override.title: Supports Model Override
supports_model_override.description: Whether callers can request a per-assessment model override with `model`.

LlmBackendInfo.title: LlmBackendInfo
LlmBackendInfo.description: Runtime LLM backend details useful to API consumers.

workspace_dir.title: Workspace Dir
workspace_dir.description: Directory used for cloned or reused repository workspaces.

reuse_strategy.title: Reuse Strategy
reuse_strategy.description: How repository workspace paths are selected and reused.

update_strategy.title: Update Strategy
update_strategy.description: How existing workspaces are refreshed before scanning.

parallel_safety.title: Parallel Safety
parallel_safety.description: Current concurrency guarantees and caveats for workspace reuse.

workspace_dir.title: Workspace Dir
workspace_dir.description: Base directory where repository workspaces are cached or reused.

component_count.title: Component Count
component_count.description: Number of explicitly configured components in repos.yaml.

components.title: Components
components.description: Configured component names. Secrets and raw repository credentials are never included.

aliases.title: Aliases
aliases.description: Configured alias names when the defaults template is used.

default_template_configured.title: Default Template Configured
default_template_configured.description: True when repos.yaml contains a defaults template for dynamic component resolution.

hot_reload.title: Hot Reload
hot_reload.description: True when the service watches repos.yaml mtime and reloads component configuration.

repositories.description: Sanitized repository configuration and workspace-cache summary.

features.title: Features
features.description: Feature switches and interface capabilities currently exposed by this process.

ServiceConfiguration.title: ServiceConfiguration
ServiceConfiguration.description: Sanitized service configuration returned by operational endpoints.

title.title: Title
title.description: Human-readable title for the pipeline step.
examples: Scan dependency manifests and lock files

status.title: Status
status.description: Outcome of the step, such as pass, fail, or skip.

findings.title: Findings
findings.description: Structured findings emitted by the step. Keys vary by step type.

evidence.title: Evidence
evidence.description: Short evidence statements supporting the step findings.

StepFindings.title: StepFindings
StepFindings.description: Structured findings from a single pipeline step.

detected_version.title: Detected Version
detected_version.description: Version of the affected component that the analyzer actually evaluated.

version_source.title: Version Source
version_source.description: Where the detected version came from, such as a lock file or worktree manifest.

affected.title: Affected
affected.description: Whether the detected version falls inside the advisory's affected range.

note.title: Note
note.description: Human-readable explanation of the version match decision.
examples: lock file — version 2.0.0 is in the explicit affected versions list

affected_ranges_summary.title: Affected Ranges Summary
affected_ranges_summary.description: Normalized summaries of the advisory ranges used for the comparison.

comparison_inputs.title: Comparison Inputs
comparison_inputs.description: Exact inputs supplied to the version comparison, including advisory ranges and explicit version lists.

comparison_trace.title: Comparison Trace
comparison_trace.description: Full ordered trace of the version comparison logic, including each match or non-match decision.

VersionContext.title: VersionContext
VersionContext.description: Concrete version evidence used during CVSS rescoring.

tags.name: assessment
tags.description: Submit vulnerability assessments and inspect pipeline output.

tags.name: jobs
tags.description: Track, inspect, and remove asynchronous assessment jobs.

tags.name: benchmark
tags.description: Compare human and automated assessment artifacts without rerunning repository analysis.
